title: EndermanNoBlock
description: Blocks Enderman from picking up blocks, FOLIA supported!
body:
# EndermanNoBlock
## Stops Enderman from picking up Blocks

### Features:
-Endermen can no longer pick up or move blocks, keeping your builds safe.

-Resolves an issue where mushrooms spreading in the End dimension could corrupt or crash your world.
### Customization:
-Change the world that allows grief to true in the config.yml file
### Why us:
-Perfect for survival and multiplayer servers that want a more stable and grief-free End experience.

Supports Folia!!!
